_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of machine learning theory and principles.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of supervised and unsupervised machine learning algorithms, including their mathematical foundations, hyperparameter behavior, and appropriate application conditions.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-027 (AI, cosine: 0.527), AG-K-009 (AG, cosine: 0.514).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.2/10 (raw 0.619). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, learning, machine]. DCWF-only terms [principles, theory] vs WIDAI-only terms [algorithms, application, appropriate, behavior, conditions, foundations] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.907 (P=0.948, R=0.870). P exceeds R by 0.078 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of machine learning theory and principles." and "Knowledge of supervised and unsupervised machine learning algorithms, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.655 ≈ STS 0.619 (gap 0.036). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, learning, machine] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 26.3%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, learning, machine]. DCWF-only: [principles, theory]. WIDAI-only: [algorithms, application, appropriate, behavior, conditions, foundations].
